name: Ultimate AI Media Generator
description: AI image and video generation via the CyberBara API. Supports Sora-2, Kling, Seedance, and Nano Banana models. Layered Python CLI architecture with credit quoting, confirmation gate before submission, batch generation, auto-save, and multi-platform support.
review: First media generation skill in the OpenClaw catalog. Comprehensive CLI covering models listing, credit quoting, task creation, polling, and batch generation via CyberBara API. Confirmation-gate before every submission is an excellent safety feature. Requires paid CyberBara API key and credits.
